summary: Completed comprehensive testing of User Lifecycle Management module. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified via Playwright - all features working correctly including user CRUD, permissions management, audit trail, filters, and search.

issues: Some users show 'Unknown Store' - this is expected legacy data behavior as noted in requirements

passed_tests: Backend: Login with valid credentials - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/users - List all users - 200 OK, returns array of users
Backend: GET /api/permission-modules - Returns 31 modules across 7 categories
Backend: POST /api/users - Create new user with email, password, name, role, permissions
Backend: POST /api/users - Duplicate email returns 400 error
Backend: GET /api/users/{id} - Get single user details
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id} - Update user name and role
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id} - Deactivate user (soft delete) with is_active=false
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id} - Reactivate user with is_active=true
Backend: PUT /api/users/{id} - Update user permissions
Backend: GET /api/users/{id}/audit - Get audit trail for specific user
Backend: GET /api/audit-trail - Get full audit trail
Backend: GET /api/audit-trail?entity_type=user - Filter by entity type
Backend: GET /api/audit-trail?action=user_created - Filter by action
Backend: Audit record created automatically on user creation
Backend: GET /api/stores - List stores for user assignment
Frontend: User Management page loads at /users route
Frontend: User cards display name, email, role, stores, status badges
Frontend: Add User button opens modal with Basic Info and Permissions tabs
Frontend: Create user form has Full Name, Email, Password, Role fields
Frontend: Role dropdown shows Admin, Manager, Staff, Cashier options
Frontend: Assigned Stores section with clickable badges
Frontend: Permissions tab shows 31 toggle switches grouped by 7 categories
Frontend: Permission categories: General, Sales, Purchase, Parties & Ledger, Discounts & Offers, HR Management, Settings
Frontend: Edit User modal - email field disabled, shows existing data
Frontend: Audit Trail modal shows history or 'No audit records found'
Frontend: Search by name/email filters users correctly
Frontend: Role filter dropdown works (All Roles, Admin, Manager, Staff, Cashier)
Frontend: Status filter dropdown works (All Status, Active, Inactive)
Frontend: Deactivate/Reactivate toggle buttons present on user cards
critical_code_review_comments: User Management implementation is complete and follows best practices
Audit trail properly tracks user_created, user_updated, user_deactivated, user_reactivated, role_changed, permissions_changed actions
Default permissions are correctly applied based on role selection
Soft delete implemented correctly - users are deactivated, not deleted
Email uniqueness enforced at API level
Password is hashed and never returned in API responses
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed users during backend testing for CRUD verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Management module fully tested. All CRUD operations work. Permissions tab has 31 modules across 7 categories (General, Sales, Purchase, Parties & Ledger, Discounts & Offers, HR Management, Settings). Audit trail tracks all user actions. Some legacy users show 'Unknown Store' which is expected behavior.

user_crud.create: WORKING - POST /api/users creates user with email, password, name, role, store_ids, permissions
user_crud.read: WORKING - GET /api/users lists all users, GET /api/users/{id} gets single user
user_crud.update: WORKING - PUT /api/users/{id} updates name, role, store_ids, permissions, is_active

roles.default_permissions: WORKING - Each role has predefined default permissions

permissions.toggle_switches: WORKING - Each permission can be toggled on/off

audit_trail.user_specific: WORKING - GET /api/users/{id}/audit returns audit history for user
audit_trail.full_trail: WORKING - GET /api/audit-trail returns all audit records
audit_trail.filters: WORKING - Can filter by entity_type and action

filters_and_search.search: WORKING - Search by name or email
filters_and_search.role_filter: WORKING - Filter by role (admin, manager, staff, cashier)
